Faropoint
# EU Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR)
## SUSTAINABILITY RISK POLICY
The European Commission’s Regulation (EU) 2019/2088 on Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR) aims to provide greater transparency on the degree of sustainability of financial products. The SFDR defines “sustainability risks” as environmental, social, or governance (ESG) events or conditions that, if they occur, could cause an actual or a potential material negative impact on the value of the investment.  
For Faropoint Industrial Value Fund IV, LP (the “Fund”), Faropoint Industrial Value Fund IV GP, LP (“Faropoint”), as its general partner, has integrated sustainability risks, as a sub-set of risks generally that could cause an actual or potential material negative impact on the value of an investment, as part of its investment decision-making and risk monitoring process. If appropriate for an investment, Faropoint may conduct sustainability risk-related due diligence and/or take steps to mitigate sustainability risks and preserve the value of the investment.  
Faropoint views ESG factors as key elements of investment return, volatility, and risk mitigation for the Fund. The degree of ESG integration into a given portfolio will depend on investment strategy and portfolio structure. While ESG factors may be considered when making an investment decision, unless otherwise specified in the portfolio’s investment strategy, neither the Fund nor any other Fund sponsored by Faropoint’s investment advisory entity (Faropoint Ventures LLC), other than those subject to either Articles 8 or 9 of the SFDR, pursue an ESG-based investment strategy or limit their investments to those that meet specific ESG criteria or standards. Any reference herein to environmental or social considerations is not intended to qualify our duty to maximize risk-adjusted returns.
## REMUNERATION POLICY
The remuneration policies of Faropoint’s investment advisory entity, Faropoint Ventures LLC, are consistent with its approach to the integration of sustainability risks into the investment decision-making process. As sustainability risks are a type of financial risk, the investment advisory firms acknowledge that failure to consider such risks could have an adverse impact on the performance of investments and the performance of the funds and portfolios managed by them. Pursuant to the irremuneration policies, the investment advisory firms award fixed and variable remuneration to staff. Variable remuneration is awarded on a discretionary basis and takes into account the performance of an individual employee, the performance of the funds and/or portfolios, and the overall financial performance of the investment adviser’s group. Accordingly, to the extent that sustainability risks have an adverse impact on performance of the funds or the portfolios, this is likely to be reflected in the overall level of variable remuneration awarded to staff.
## NO CONSIDERATION OF PRINCIPAL ADVERSE IMPACTS
Faropoint and its affiliated investment advisory firms consider ESG factors in their investment process in furtherance of their objective of delivering attractive risk-adjusted returns. While such considerations may include both an investment’s potential material positive and negative impacts on certain ESG factors, they do not formally consider adverse impacts of investment decisions on sustainability factors as set forth in the draft SFDR regulatory technical standards. Faropoint, through its affiliated investment advisory firms, has chosen not to do so at the present time as it considers that its existing ESG policies and procedures are appropriate, proportionate and tailored to the investment strategies of the funds managed by its advisory firms. Faropoint and its affiliated investment advisory firms continue to monitor regulatory developments with respect to SFDR and other ESG-related laws and regulations and will, when required or as they deem appropriate, make changes to their policies and procedures.

# Tech-enabled industrial real estate investment manager
We acquire, manage, and optimize urban logistics assets at scale, seeking to deliver institutional returns in a market underserved by traditional capital.
[Explore the Markets](https://www.faropoint.com/#explore-the-market)
![3D illustration of a last-mile warehouse with delivery trucks near a city skyline.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/698a1c32ba7f6e3013ebcf8c_hero-img-mobile%20\(1\).png)
Faropoint is a vertically integrated investment manager specializing in urban industrial real estate. We control the entire value chain - from deal sourcing and underwriting to asset management and disposition - powered by proprietary technology and deep local relationships in high-barrier urban markets.

## Understanding the Market
Modern commerce runs on proximity. E-commerce, supply chain regionalization, and manufacturing reshoring have driven demand across industrial formats.
From large fulfillment centers to mid-size sorting facilities to smaller urban warehouses.
Institutional capital concentrates in the largest assets due to access constraints, leaving the sub-100K SF segment structurally underserved despite superior fundamentals.
[Explore the Markets](https://www.faropoint.com/#explore-the-market)

## Market Opportunity
The sub-100K SF segment, the largest in industrial real estate, maintains the tightest fundamentals, with sustained demand driven by structural trends
E-commerce Growth
Supply Chain Regionalization
Reshoring & Nearshoring
![Pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged in a grid on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6969e663057291369fd56e5e_section-dot-pattern.png)
## The Access Challenge
Structural barriers limit institutional access to urban industrial real estate, creating a fragmented and inefficient investment landscape.
Information asymmetry
Approximately 80% of properties are privately owned by individual landlords or owner-occupiers, making portfolio aggregation difficult for institutional investors.
Small deal size
Roughly 90% of transactions require less than $10 million of equity, reducing efficiency for large-scale capital deployment.
Lack of data
Off-market transactions, constrained public records, and the absence of purpose-built underwriting systems contribute to significant information asymmetry across the market.
![Glossy orange and yellow gradient rounded rectangle with a subtle glow effect.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989bedfffb005991c337e99_access-glow.png)
## Purpose-built   
to operate at scale.
Local teams. Proprietary data. AI-powered underwriting.   
A single platform that sees more and moves fast.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c65b846f1b512e7a97f1_card-dot-pattern\(purpose\).png)
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c71571bd8132d7d4c7a5_purpose-hover-glow.png)
![Golden circular globe icon with intersecting arcs on a white background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6969d2908498d014d53f83ba_access-icon.png)
### Comprehensive Market Intelligence
Local teams across high-barrier markets maintain relationships with over 400 brokerages nationally. FarOS, our proprietary deal sourcing platform, aggregates this network into approximately $40 billion in annual deal flow - providing early access to opportunities and comprehensive market coverage.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c65b846f1b512e7a97f1_card-dot-pattern\(purpose\).png)
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c71571bd8132d7d4c7a5_purpose-hover-glow.png)
![Four golden star-shaped sparkles of varying sizes on a white background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c87834bfc24ce1d7a478_AI-Icon.png)
### AI-Powered Underwriting
REXy, our AI-powered underwriting platform, delivers proprietary rent and sales estimates while identifying pricing anomalies across thousands of assets. By augmenting human judgment with automated analysis, we enable faster, higher-quality investment decisions.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c65b846f1b512e7a97f1_card-dot-pattern\(purpose\).png)
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c71571bd8132d7d4c7a5_purpose-hover-glow.png)
![Golden checkmark icon with sparkling effects on a white background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c8ce29d119d1be67ce90_disciplined-icon.png)
### Disciplined Selection
Rigorous selectivity drives our approach: approximately 2% of sourced opportunities convert to acquisitions, ensuring only what we believe to be the highest-quality assets enter the portfolio.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c65b846f1b512e7a97f1_card-dot-pattern\(purpose\).png)
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c71571bd8132d7d4c7a5_purpose-hover-glow.png)
![Orange hexagon shape with a circle inside, surrounded by sparkle effects on a white background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6989c9075fc7b7c1f3f8ce76_integrated-icon.png)
### Integrated Operations
Vertically integrated platform seeks to maximize value across the full investment lifecycle. In-house capabilities, from acquisition and underwriting to asset management and construction, enable efficient execution at institutional scale.
![Pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged in a grid on a black background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/69692c932cda8af835db14e1/6969e663057291369fd56e5e_section-dot-pattern.png)
Proven at scale

A decade of disciplined execution in small-bay industrial.

## Understanding the Market
Modern commerce runs on proximity. E-commerce, supply chain regionalization, and manufacturing reshoring have driven demand across industrial formats.
From large fulfillment centers to mid-size sorting facilities to smaller urban warehouses. 
Institutional capital concentrates in the largest assets due to access constraints, leaving the sub-100K SF segment structurally underserved despite superior fundamentals.
Explore the Markets⟨16⟩
![Aerial view of a suburban neighborhood with five blue warehouse buildings and several delivery trucks parked nearby.⟨17⟩]![Aerial view of an industrial area with multiple blue warehouse buildings surrounded by roads and residential houses.⟨18⟩]

## Market Opportunity
The sub-100K SF segment, the largest in industrial real estate, maintains the tightest fundamentals, with sustained demand driven by structural trends
E-commerce Growth
Supply Chain Regionalization
Reshoring & Nearshoring
![Pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged in a grid on a black background.⟨24⟩]
## The Access Challenge
Structural barriers limit institutional access to urban industrial real estate, creating a fragmented and inefficient investment landscape.
Information asymmetry
Approximately 80% of properties are privately owned by individual landlords or owner-occupiers, making portfolio aggregation difficult for institutional investors.
Small deal size
Roughly 90% of transactions require less than $10 million of equity, reducing efficiency for large-scale capital deployment.
Lack of data
Off-market transactions, constrained public records, and the absence of purpose-built underwriting systems contribute to significant information asymmetry across the market.
![Glossy orange and yellow gradient rounded rectangle with a subtle glow effect.⟨25⟩]
## Purpose-built   
to operate at scale.
Local teams. Proprietary data. AI-powered underwriting.   
A single platform that sees more and moves fast.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.⟨26⟩]
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.⟨27⟩]
![Golden circular globe icon with intersecting arcs on a white background.⟨28⟩]
### Comprehensive Market Intelligence
Local teams across high-barrier markets maintain relationships with over 400 brokerages nationally. FarOS, our proprietary deal sourcing platform, aggregates this network into approximately $40 billion in annual deal flow - providing early access to opportunities and comprehensive market coverage.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.⟨26⟩]
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.⟨27⟩]
![Four golden star-shaped sparkles of varying sizes on a white background.⟨29⟩]
### AI-Powered Underwriting
REXy, our AI-powered underwriting platform, delivers proprietary rent and sales estimates while identifying pricing anomalies across thousands of assets. By augmenting human judgment with automated analysis, we enable faster, higher-quality investment decisions.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.⟨26⟩]
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.⟨27⟩]
![Golden checkmark icon with sparkling effects on a white background.⟨30⟩]
### Disciplined Selection
Rigorous selectivity drives our approach: approximately 2% of sourced opportunities convert to acquisitions, ensuring only what we believe to be the highest-quality assets enter the portfolio.
![Grid pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged on a transparent background.⟨26⟩]
![Orange concentric glowing light effect on a black background.⟨27⟩]
![Orange hexagon shape with a circle inside, surrounded by sparkle effects on a white background.⟨31⟩]
### Integrated Operations
Vertically integrated platform seeks to maximize value across the full investment lifecycle. In-house capabilities, from acquisition and underwriting to asset management and construction, enable efficient execution at institutional scale.
![Pattern of evenly spaced small white dots arranged in a grid on a black background.⟨24⟩]
Proven at scale
## Our Track Record
A decade of disciplined execution in small-bay industrial.

metadata.title: Faropoint - Last-Mile Industrial Real Estate Investment Manager
metadata.description: Faropoint is a tech-enabled investment manager focused on small-bay industrial real estate across major U.S. markets. Vertically integrated from sourcing to disposition.

# Stay up to date with the latest news
Newsroom
Blog
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992adcc2f4108bb48da1237_los%20angels.svg) Last-Mile Logistics Specialist Acquires Four-Building Portfolio in Ontario May 2, 2025 Faropoint, a tech-enabled real estate investment manager specializing in last-mile industrial properties, acquired a four-building, multi-tenant industrial portfolio in Ontario. It’s the company’s second acquisition in Southern California following an acquisition in March. Acquisitions Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.latimes.com/b2b/commercial-real-estate/story/2025-05-02/last-mile-logistics-specialist-acquires-four-building-portfolio-ontario)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992adc3d912a2f5cde8e335_Logos.svg) Faropoint Announces 195,421 SF Class A Industrial Development Project in Strategic New Jersey Location December 7, 2024 Tech-Enabled Firm Expands Development Pipeline with Two-Building Project in High-Demand Exit 9 Submarket Development Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.costar.com/article/1444508343/faropoint-duegen-develop-logistics-center-for-small-bay-tenants)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69971fe4bffd6e654e6329ee_Logos-3.png) TRS of Texas Commits to Opportunistic US Industrial via Faropoint Fund November 12, 2024 Pension fund commits $50m to Faropoint Industrial SLB Fund Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://realassets.ipe.com/news/trs-of-texas-commits-to-opportunistic-us-industrial-via-faropoint-fund/10076769.article)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992add5c66d81e7810bcb4a_instit.svg) Faropoint Acquired Two Industrial Assets in Atlanta October 24, 2024 Faropoint has qcquired 48-50 Best Friend Road and 1056 Personal Place, two infill light industrial proeperties located in Atlanta's premier Northeast and I-85 South/Airport submarkets Acquisitions Read More (opens in new tab)](https://irei.com/news/faropoint-acquired-two-industrial-assets-in-atlanta/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/699721b7a4ec94fe83bbf3c2_Globest.png) Faropoint Gets $150M Loan for Industrial Sale Leaseback Fund October 23, 2024 Faropoint has grabbed a $150 million acquisition loan that will play a role in supporting the tech focused real estate manager's industrial real Sale Leasback (ISLBM) fund Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.globest.com/2024/10/23/faropoint-gets-150m-loan-for-industrial-sale-leaseback-fund/?slreturn=2024122462520)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69972233041ed06d28aebdfe_Bisnow.png) Faropoint’s Sale-Leaseback Strategy Starts Small For Big Returns September 25, 2024 The industrial asset manager launched a $300M sale-leaseback fund dedicated to buying properties from tenants to lease back to them, giving tenants an easy way to secure the cash they need to keep going and allowing Faropoint to aggregate warehouse portfolios it can sell to larger investors. Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.bisnow.com/national/news/capital-markets/faropoint-126047)
No items found.

# Stay up to date with the latest news
Newsroom
Blog
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992add5c66d81e7810bcb4a_instit.svg) APG makes largest commitment to Faropoint’s $1b industrial fund  February 23, 2026 Faropoint, a tech-enabled real estate investment manager specializing in last-mile industrial warehouses, announced that APG Asset Management N.V., on behalf of pension fund client ABP, has made the largest commitment to date to the firm’s Industrial Value Fund IV. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://irei.com/news/apg-makes-largest-commitment-to-faropoints-1b-industrial-fund/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9695e2a13ebdb79392b15_Logos.png) Faropoint Completes Largest Portfolio Refi by Number of Assets January 27, 2026 Faropoint, a real estate investment firm focused on last-mile industrial properties in high-population- growth markets, has received $273 million of financing proceeds from a bank syndicate Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.connectcre.com/stories/faropoint-completes-largest-portfolio-refi-by-number-of-assets/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992add5c66d81e7810bcb4a_instit.svg) Faropoint completes $273m portfolio refinancing January 26, 2026 Faropoint, a tech-enabled real estate investment firm focused on last-mile industrial properties in high population-growth markets Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://irei.com/news/faropoint-completes-273m-portfolio-refinancing-2/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992adeed0f4e44dbd12e55b_NJBIZ.svg) Faropoint, Deugen land $33M financing for Exit 9 industrial project July 18, 2025 Two-building Joyce Kilmer Logistics Center will comprise 195K square feet Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://njbiz.com/faropoint-deugen-exit-9-industrial-financing/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992add5c66d81e7810bcb4a_instit.svg) Mapletree sells 1.8msf industrial portfolio to Faropoint for $328m June 30, 2025 Mapletree Investments has sold 1.8 million-square-foot industrial portfolio to Faropoint, a tech-enabled industrial real estate investment manager, for $328 million. Acquisitions Read More (opens in new tab)](https://irei.com/news/mapletree-sells-1-8msf-industrial-portfolio-to-faropoint-for-328m/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/6992add5c66d81e7810bcb4a_instit.svg) Faropoint launches Industrial Value Fund IV, targeting $1b June 25, 2025 Faropoint, a vertically integrated real estate investment manager focused on urban logistics, has announced the launch of its flagship Industrial Value Fund IV, targeting $1 billion in capital commitments. Fund Launches Read More (opens in new tab)](https://irei.com/news/faropoint-launches-industrial-value-fund-iv-targeting-1b/)
No items found.

# Stay up to date with the latest news
Newsroom
Blog
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a95f2018bb9ec2930ac8fe_Bussines%20Journals.png) Faropoint closes on $550M credit facility as it focuses on buying industrial assets June 17, 2021 The New Jersey real estate investment firm plans to acquire an additional $1 billion of assets across the U.S. over the next two years. Financing Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.bizjournals.com/newyork/news/2021/06/17/faropoint-550m-credit-facility-industrial-assets.html)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69972233041ed06d28aebdfe_Bisnow.png) Israeli Investor Using Proprietary Data, Software To Rapidly Assemble Last-Mile Logistics Portfolios Across U.S. February 9, 2021 A Recently publication of Bisnow about Faropoints’ strategy and acquisition platform. The uniqueness of this tool is that we are using it as a kind of one-buyer, multiple-seller marketplace. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.bisnow.com/philadelphia/news/industrial/faropoint-industrial-rapid-last-mile-portfolio-aggregation-107668)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a95f5a799439f88de40e89_ROI.png) Faropoint: Meet industrial real estate private equity firm that is coming into southern New Jersey in big way January 22, 2021 Faropoint has purchased 11 industrial assets in Greater Philadelphia in 2020, concluding its first year of operations in the market. 10 of the assets are located in Southern NJ and one is in King of Prussia, PA. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://www.roi-nj.com/2021/01/22/real_estate/faropoint-meet-industrial-reit-that-is-coming-into-southern-new-jersey-in-big-way/)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast IV December 21, 2020 "Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with David Schneider, Supply Chain Management Expert. The world has encountered an unprecedented amount of uncertainty in 2020 which posed unique challenges to companies’ supply chain. This has benefited the logistics real estate market as demand for space is at record highs." Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://open.spotify.com/episode/16PcsX00k6tVtEzrc3j15l?si=nMrqNQqkSjOhFQPXZXYIyQ)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast III November 18, 2020 Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with Joshua Mayers, Senior Vice President at KeyBank. The global pandemic, along with the all-time low-interest rate, affects all financial markets and, more specifically, real estate lending. A lot has changed since the GFC. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://open.spotify.com/episode/3sE9LUMOKmLXTuJCmSXdmo?si=WrA6LBpYSi-7Tn-Vz0hELg)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast II October 19, 2020 Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with Brian Califf, Executive Vice President & Elliot Embry, Vice President At NAI Saig commercial brokerage company. Despite the Global pandemic, positive market fundamentals and strong demand boded well for the Memphis industrial market. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)](https://open.spotify.com/episode/70NZcdgVJqtiT9qVmb0Ql1?si=f696IHByTIedsUnHl50JAA)
No items found.

⟨15⟩ https://www.bizjournals.com/newyork/news/2021/06/17/faropoint-550m-credit-facility-industrial-assets.html: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a95f2018bb9ec2930ac8fe_Bussines%20Journals.png) Faropoint closes on $550M credit facility as it focuses on buying industrial assets June 17, 2021 The New Jersey real estate investment firm plans to acquire an additional $1 billion of assets across the U.S. over the next two years. Financing Read More (opens in new tab)
⟨16⟩ https://www.bisnow.com/philadelphia/news/industrial/faropoint-industrial-rapid-last-mile-portfolio-aggregation-107668: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69972233041ed06d28aebdfe_Bisnow.png) Israeli Investor Using Proprietary Data, Software To Rapidly Assemble Last-Mile Logistics Portfolios Across U.S. February 9, 2021 A Recently publication of Bisnow about Faropoints’ strategy and acquisition platform. The uniqueness of this tool is that we are using it as a kind of one-buyer, multiple-seller marketplace. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)
⟨17⟩ https://www.roi-nj.com/2021/01/22/real_estate/faropoint-meet-industrial-reit-that-is-coming-into-southern-new-jersey-in-big-way/: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a95f5a799439f88de40e89_ROI.png) Faropoint: Meet industrial real estate private equity firm that is coming into southern New Jersey in big way January 22, 2021 Faropoint has purchased 11 industrial assets in Greater Philadelphia in 2020, concluding its first year of operations in the market. 10 of the assets are located in Southern NJ and one is in King of Prussia, PA. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)
⟨18⟩ https://open.spotify.com/episode/16PcsX00k6tVtEzrc3j15l?si=nMrqNQqkSjOhFQPXZXYIyQ: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast IV December 21, 2020 "Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with David Schneider, Supply Chain Management Expert. The world has encountered an unprecedented amount of uncertainty in 2020 which posed unique challenges to companies’ supply chain. This has benefited the logistics real estate market as demand for space is at record highs." Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)
⟨19⟩ https://open.spotify.com/episode/3sE9LUMOKmLXTuJCmSXdmo?si=WrA6LBpYSi-7Tn-Vz0hELg: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast III November 18, 2020 Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with Joshua Mayers, Senior Vice President at KeyBank. The global pandemic, along with the all-time low-interest rate, affects all financial markets and, more specifically, real estate lending. A lot has changed since the GFC. Company Growth Read More (opens in new tab)
⟨20⟩ https://open.spotify.com/episode/70NZcdgVJqtiT9qVmb0Ql1?si=f696IHByTIedsUnHl50JAA: ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6969fe5c7e11e1027784605a/69a9cd4e61b4b9a41801bbeb_SPOTIFY.png) The Faropoint Group podcast II October 19, 2020 Adir Levitas, CEO of the Faropoint Group, hosts an in-depth podcast interview with Brian Califf, Executive Vice President & Elliot Embry, Vice President At NAI Saig commercial brokerage company.
